violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Multiple freezer items and refrigerated items not date marked.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. Unable to determine if hood is provided with proper air flow.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. Ensure 3 tub system is operated as follows: 1) Hot soapy water 2) Clear water rinse 3) Sanitizing rinse 4) Air dry all utensils

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Surface of equipment/utensil did not reach minimum temperature of 160F during hot water sanitize rinse of warewash machine. Homestyle dish machine used. Unable to determine if machine reaches minimum temperature requirements.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Unfinished construction in grill room.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
